headline: TransMedics (TMDX) Down 4.4% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
summary: TransMedics (TMDX) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Jim Cramer on Danaher: “At These Prices, It’s Clearly Overvalued”
summary: Danaher Corporation (NYSE:DHR) was among the stocks Jim Cramer talked about as he discussed the recent rally in several AI-related stocks. Cramer compared the company’s valuation to its organic growth, as he remarked: Danaher, once among the most revered companies in the entire market, still trades at 21 times earnings.
